sql.title: SQL for Beginners
sql.description: Learn SQL from zero with hands-on practice.
sql.moreComingSoon: More SQL for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

sql_module_5.title: Calculated Columns and SQL Expressions
sql_module_5.description: Teach learners to create new values from existing data so raw tables become useful reports.
outcomes: Use arithmetic and expressions inside SELECT.
Rename outputs with aliases for readability.
why: Builds confidence with calculated columns and sql expressions.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

section_5_1.title: Creating New Values in Queries
section_5_1.description: Learn how SQL expressions create new values from existing columns, including basic math operations inside SELECT queries.

section_5_2.title: Column Aliases
section_5_2.description: Practice using aliases to rename calculated columns so query results are easier to read and understand.

section_5_3.title: Simple Functions
section_5_3.description: Explore simple SQL functions for working with text, numbers, and dates while keeping queries beginner-friendly.

section_5_4.title: Expression Practice
section_5_4.description: Apply expressions, aliases, and simple functions to build small report-style queries from real table data.
